item.text:
Tenerife Harbour Master, |this is*I am*calling from| Dockwise.
|QUESTION. Do I have permission to*May I*Can I| enter the fairway?

Dockwise, |this is*I am*calling from| Tenerife Harbour Master.
|ANSWER. Stand by*Negative. Wait*Out of the question| until the pilot arrives.
|QUESTION. Do you require*Do you need*Surely you need| a tug for the berthing manoeuvres?

Tenerife Harbour Master, |this is*I am*calling from| Dockwise.
|ANSWER. I will need*I should need*I might need| three tugs and a pilot.
